label: PoC MQTT PostgreSQL + Dashboard
info: Ingest Zigbee2MQTT + ChirpStack events, normalize, upsert the device registry, insert telemetry into Postgres, and drive a FlowFuse Dashboard histogram + control buttons.

Query activity (record)
query:
SELECT date_trunc('minute', ts) AS bucket,
       count(*) AS events
FROM poc.telemetry
WHERE ts >= now() - interval '1 hour'
GROUP BY bucket
ORDER BY bucket;

Interactive controls style
format:
<template>
  </template>

<style>
  /* poc_interactive_controls_v1 */
  select,
  input:not([type='checkbox']):not([type='radio']):not([type='range']):not([type='hidden']),
  textarea {
    min-height: 34px !important;
    padding: 6px 10px !important;
    border: 2px solid #4f6f8d !important;
    border-radius: 6px !important;
    background: #ffffff !important;
    color: #12263a !important;
    font-size: 14px !important;
    line-height: 1.35 !important;
    box-shadow: inset 0 1px 1px rgba(15, 35, 60, 0.08) !important;
    transition: border-color 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease, background-color 120ms ease !important;
  }

  select {
    appearance: none !important;
    -webkit-appearance: none !important;
    cursor: pointer !important;
    padding-right: 30px !important;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 50%, #36506b 50%),
      linear-gradient(135deg, #36506b 50%, transparent 50%) !important;
    background-position:
      calc(100% - 14px) calc(50% - 3px),
      calc(100% - 8px) calc(50% - 3px) !important;
    background-size: 6px 6px, 6px 6px !important;
    background-repeat: no-repeat !important;
  }

  input[type='checkbox'], input[type='radio'] {
    accent-color: #1565c0 !important;
    cursor: pointer !important;
    transform: scale(1.05);
  }

  select:hover:not(:disabled),
  input:hover:not(:disabled),
  textarea:hover:not(:disabled) {
    border-color: #1565c0 !important;
    background-color: #f4f9ff !important;
  }

  select:focus,
  input:focus,
  textarea:focus,
  select:focus-visible,
  input:focus-visible,
  textarea:focus-visible {
    outline: none !important;
    border-color: #0d47a1 !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(21, 101, 192, 0.22) !important;
    background-color: #ffffff !important;
  }

  select:disabled,
  input:disabled,
  textarea:disabled {
    background: #eceff3 !important;
    border-color: #cfd8e3 !important;
    color: #7d8a99 !important;
    cursor: not-allowed !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }

  button {
    min-height: 34px !important;
    border-radius: 6px !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
  }

  button:focus,
  button:focus-visible {
    outline: none !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(21, 101, 192, 0.22) !important;
  }
</style>
